calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
William Duncan, Esq. for Plaintiff: Textainer Equipment Management Limited.
Plaintiff's witness: Richard Murphy, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: McLarens Shippng Limited as follows:
Principal $98,071.69
Interest $1,493.41
Attorney's Fees $7,491.93
Total $107,057.03
Judgment singed in open court.
